div.p: Shows memory access pattern during single allocation

g.text: Step 2: Read next pointer from block

ol.li:
Pool structure — Likely L1 hot (frequently accessed)
Cache Line 0: fields 0x00-0x3F (read)
Cache Line 1: fields 0x40-0x7F (read/write)

Free block — May be L2/L3 if not recently accessed
Single cache line (first 8 bytes for next pointer) L1 hit scenario: ~2-3 cycles L1 miss, L2 hit: ~10-15 cycles Full miss to memory: ~100-300 cycles Prefetch opportunity: Sequential allocation through free list benefits from hardware prefetcher.
